name: edisonchenai--protea-self-evolving-life-agent
description: Self-evolving artificial life agent. Three-ring architecture: Ring 0 (Sentinel) supervises, Ring 1 (Intelligence) drives LLM-powered evolution, Ring 2 (Evolvable Code) is the living program that self-restructures, self-reproduces, and self-evolves. Supports Anthropic, OpenAI, DeepSeek, and Qwen as LLM providers. Includes fitness scoring, gene pool inheritance, tiered memory, skill crystallization, Telegram bot, and web dashboard.
